chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1260 of 2020 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 02.12.2025 Mr. Ghulam Murtaza Korai, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General ************** Learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press the present Constitution Petition. Accordingly, same is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E M.Ali*
